findings.title: Missing changelog entry for users feature
findings.explain: CHANGELOG.md should include a users feature note so recent changes are traceable.

findings.title: Checklist drift: apply step is missing
findings.explain: The checklist must include Apply to complete the verify → plan → apply remediation loop.

findings.title: Structural inconsistency in workout type naming
findings.explain: Workout services use WorkoutPlan as the canonical exported domain type. Consistent type naming keeps feature contracts predictable.

findings.title: Missing expected notes artifact marker
findings.explain: PLAYBOOK_NOTES.md should include a Last Verified marker so maintenance state is explicit.
